title: RFC: avoid uninit values and in-between-loops leaks in `_proxy.make_reduced_type`
author: neutrinoceros
body:
close #2836
I don't think this one is an actual bug, but a clean refactor should help reducing the number of false positive in @devdanzin's automated analysis
